## Checklist

- [ ] Current documentation is updated.
- [ ] Tests cover positive and negative behavior where applicable.
- [ ] No credentials, private data, or confidential material are included.
- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `SECURITY.md`, `GOVERNANCE.md`, and `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`.
